message:
fix(rust): Address code review issues in jfp CLI skeleton

- Fix cache_dir() to respect JFP_HOME override (consistency with config_dir)
- Replace unwrap() with proper error handling in about.rs and categories.rs
- Mark _no_color as intentionally unused with underscore prefix
